.project/seo/example.com/2025.10.03/cache/
├── pages/                      # Individual page JSON files
│   ├── a1b2c3d4e5f6.json     # URL hash as filename
│   ├── b2c3d4e5f6a7.json
│   └── ...
├── metadata/                   # Response metadata for each page
│   ├── a1b2c3d4e5f6.json
│   ├── b2c3d4e5f6a7.json
│   └── ...
└── crawl_summary.json         # Overall crawl statistics
